requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas J1772 / CCS1 Ecosystem
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲J1772 / CCS1生态
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲J1772 / CCS1生態

summary.en: Nicaragua does not appear to have a clearly published official nationwide EV connector mandate on the official sources reviewed. Because Nicaragua uses an Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz electrical environment and imported vehicles in the region commonly follow the Americas connector ecosystem, exporters should expect SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1 for AC charging and CCS Combo 1 for DC fast charging unless a project, fleet, or authority specifies otherwise. The exact connector must be confirmed with MEM / INE, the utility, project owner, and charge-point operator before quotation, labelling, or shipment.
summary.zh: 根据已查阅的官方来源，尼加拉瓜尚未明确公开全国统一电动汽车接口强制规则。由于尼加拉瓜采用美洲体系120/240 V、60 Hz电气环境，且区域进口车辆通常遵循美洲接口生态，出口商应预期交流充电采用SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1、直流快充采用CCS Combo 1，除非项目、车队或主管机构另有规定。具体接口须在报价、贴标或发货前与MEM / INE、公用事业单位、项目业主和充电点运营商确认。
summary.zht: 根據已查閱的官方來源，尼加拉瓜尚未明確公開全國統一電動汽車接口強制規則。由於尼加拉瓜採用美洲體系120/240 V、60 Hz電氣環境，且區域進口車輛通常遵循美洲接口生態，出口商應預期交流充電採用SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1、直流快充採用CCS Combo 1，除非項目、車隊或主管機構另有規定。具體接口須在報價、貼標或發貨前與MEM / INE、公用事業單位、項目業主和充電點運營商確認。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1 — AC charging connector commonly used in the Americas
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS configurations
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project-specific MEM / INE / utility / charge-point-operator connector requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T connector hardware is physically incompatible with SAE J1772 / Type 1 and CCS1 vehicle inlets, and China DC charging commonly uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS communication stack. GB/T 18487.1-2023 and GB/T 20234 evidence can support a design history but cannot make a GB/T-only charger plug-compatible with Nicaragua projects using J1772 or CCS1.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T接口硬件与SAE J1772 / Type 1和CCS1车辆接口在物理上不兼容，中国直流充电通常采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS通信栈。GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 20234证据可作为设计历史支持，但不能使仅支持GB/T的充电桩与采用J1772或CCS1的尼加拉瓜项目实现插接兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T接口硬體與SAE J1772 / Type 1和CCS1車輛接口在物理上不兼容，中國直流充電通常採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS通訊棧。GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 20234證據可作為設計歷史支持，但不能使僅支持GB/T的充電樁與採用J1772或CCS1的尼加拉瓜項目實現插接兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A GB/T-connector charger needs a hardware and protocol change before use on a Nicaragua project that specifies J1772 or CCS1. The redesign should cover the vehicle coupler, cable, inlet mating geometry, locking, proximity pilot and control pilot functions, DC communication stack, labels, temperature-rise evidence, and spare parts. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-compliant connector design. Because an official Nicaragua connector mandate was not confirmed, the required connector should be written into the project specification before procurement.
gap.zh: 若尼加拉瓜项目指定J1772或CCS1，仅带GB/T接口的充电桩在使用前需要进行硬件和协议变更。重新设计应覆盖车辆耦合器、电缆、插接几何、锁止、接近导引和控制导引功能、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据及备件。转接器不应被视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。由于未确认尼加拉瓜官方接口强制规则，采购前应将所需接口写入项目规范。
gap.zht: 若尼加拉瓜項目指定J1772或CCS1，僅帶GB/T接口的充電樁在使用前需要進行硬體和協議變更。重新設計應覆蓋車輛耦合器、電纜、插接幾何、鎖止、接近導引和控制導引功能、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據及備件。轉接器不應被視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。由於未確認尼加拉瓜官方接口強制規則，採購前應將所需接口寫入項目規範。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm with INE/MEM and the project owner — J1772 / CCS1 is the conservative Americas-market assumption, but a Nicaragua-wide official connector mandate was not confirmed from official sources
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a J1772 / CCS1 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T connector chargers are not plug-compatible with the J1772 / CCS1 ecosystem commonly used in the Americas. Confirm the exact Nicaragua project connector with INE/MEM and the buyer, then redesign the hardware and communication stack accordingly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T接口充电桩与美洲常用J1772 / CCS1生态不具备插接兼容性。应与INE/MEM及买方确认尼加拉瓜具体项目接口，再相应重新设计硬件和通信栈。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T接口充電樁與美洲常用J1772 / CCS1生態不具備插接兼容性。應與INE/MEM及買方確認尼加拉瓜具體項目接口，再相應重新設計硬體和通訊棧。
